badge: A new control panel — rebuilt from scratch
heroPre: Run your game servers like it’s
subtitle: {{name}} gives you a fast, focused panel for deploying, managing and scaling game servers — without the clutter.

speed.title: Built for speed
speed.body: A runtime tuned for instant consoles, live stats and zero-lag file edits.

secure.title: Secure by default
secure.body: CSRF-guarded, schema-validated, no tokens in the browser. Hardened end to end.

mods.title: Mods & marketplace
mods.body: Install mods, plugins and modpacks straight from the panel in a couple of clicks.
